questions.original_question: What kind of services does Zeekr provide other than vehicle sales?
questions.answer: Zeekr offers a range of services beyond vehicle sales, including comprehensive after-sales care through its Zeekr Care initiative. This includes intelligent vehicle monitoring, remote diagnostics, and 24/7 roadside assistance, which covered 31 provinces in China and 38 countries as of December 31, 2024. Additionally, Zeekr provides doorstep maintenance services through the “Zeekr Carefree Packages” and “Power Delivery” services, where vehicles are taken to charging stations and returned to customers upon request, covering 44 cities in China. Zeekr also engages customers with value-added services like short to long-term vehicle subscriptions. Furthermore, Zeekr generates revenue from research and development services, sales of batteries and components, and licensing of related technologies. This information is based on knowledge available before 2024-12-31.

rag_info.chunk_content: Lotus Technology's after-sales services comprise a suite of lifetime caretaking packages for customers that cover the entire product lifecycle, such as quality assurance, roadside assistance, 5G data packages, and recharge services. Warranty policies. Currently, Lotus Technology's warranty package for its BEV models provides comprehensive extended protection for different types of vehicle purchasers pursuant to their purchase uses. Zeekr Care. Zeekr Care is Lotus Technology's customer support initiative. Zeekr Care uses intelligent solutions to remotely monitor vehicle conditions and diagnose potential technical issues. If a vehicle malfunctions, drivers may request immediate roadside assistance online and access the 24/7 user companion through Lotus Technology's nationwide service network. Zeekr Care covered 31 provinces in China and 38 countries as of December 31, 2024. In 2024, Zeekr Care performed approximately 38,000 instances of accident roadside assistance in China. Other customer services. Lotus Technology also provides a suite of customer services that are brought to customers' homes, such as doorstep maintenance, through the “Zeekr Carefree Packages.” In addition, Zeekr Power began to offer “Power Delivery” services since the fourth quarter of 2021. Upon request, Lotus Technology drives customers’ BEVs to nearby charging stations and brings them back to customers’ designated places when the charging is finished. As of December 31, 2024, Power Delivery services had covered 44 cities in China. Lotus Technology offers a variety of value-added services to serve and engage its customers. For instance, Lotus Technology plans to offer short to long-term vehicle subscriptions to attract users to drive its BEVs.

rag_info.chunk_content: ZEEKR Intelligent Technology Holding Limited (the “Company” or “Zeekr”) was incorporated under the laws of the Cayman Islands on March 31, 2021. The Company, together with its subsidiaries (collectively, the “Group”), is principally engaged in the commercialization and sales of electric vehicles and batteries, as well as the provision of automotive-related research and development services. Prior to the establishment of ZEEKR Intelligent Technology Holding Limited, the Group’s businesses were conducted through the following entities: (i) ZEEKR Automobile (Shanghai) Co., Ltd., previously known as Shanghai Maple Guorun Automobile Company Ltd. (“Zeekr Shanghai”); (ii) ZEEKR Automobile (Ningbo Hangzhou Bay New Zone) Co., Ltd. (“Zeekr Hangzhou Bay”); (iii) Viridi E-Mobility Technology (Ningbo) Co., Ltd. (“Ningbo Viridi”); (iv) ZEEKR Technology Europe AB (“ZTE”, previously known as China-Euro Vehicle Technology Aktiebolag or “CEVT”). In 2021, in an effort to establish an independent Battery Electric Vehicles (BEV) business to obtain investment from outside investors and in preparation for an overseas listing, Zhejiang Geely Holding Group Co., Ltd. (“Geely Holding”), the controlling shareholder of Geely Automobile Holdings Limited (“Geely Auto”), undertook a series of contemplated reorganizations (the “Reorganization”). The main purpose of the Reorganization was to establish ZEEKR Intelligent Technology Holding Limited as the overseas holding company for the above BEV-related businesses that were originally operated within Geely Holding and Geely Auto. Subsequent to the establishment of ZEEKR Intelligent Technology Holding Limited in March 2021, the above businesses were transferred to ZEEKR Intelligent Technology Holding Limited by Geely Holding and Geely Auto as part of the Reorganization.

rag_info.chunk_content: In addition to vehicle sales, Lotus Technology generated revenues from research and development services, other services, and sales of batteries and other components. Lotus Technology's total revenue amounted to RMB6,527.5 million, RMB31,899.4 million, and RMB51,672.6 million (US$7,277.9 million) in 2021, 2022, and 2023, respectively, with a gross profit margin of 15.9%, 7.7%, and 13.3%, respectively. Lotus Technology recorded a net loss of RMB4,514.3 million, RMB7,655.1 million, and RMB8,264.2 million (US$1,164.0 million) in 2021, 2022, and 2023, respectively. Lotus Technology is a fast-growing BEV technology company. Through developing and offering next-generation premium BEVs and technology-driven solutions, Lotus Technology aspires to lead the electrification, intelligentization, and innovation of the automobile industry. Since its inception, Lotus Technology has focused on innovation and technological advancement in BEV architecture, hardware, software, and application of new technologies. Lotus Technology's efforts are backed by its strong in-house R&D capabilities, high operational flexibility, and flat, efficient organizational structure. Together, these features enable fast product development, launch, and iteration, and a series of customer-oriented products and go-to-market strategies. Thus, Lotus Technology is able to rapidly expand even with a limited operating history. • ZEEKR 001. With an unwavering commitment to its mission, Lotus Technology released ZEEKR 001 in April 2021, a five-seater, cross-over hatchback vehicle model with superior performance and functionality. Targeting the premium BEV market, ZEEKR 001 is Lotus Technology's first vehicle model and the world’s first mass-produced pure electric shooting brake, according to Frost & Sullivan.

metadata.title_summary:
title: Direct Sales and Service Model 
summary: The company adopts a customer-centric go-to-market strategy, spearheaded by a skilled in-house sales and marketing team of 7,134 members, with a significant majority having extensive experience in the automobile and retail sectors. This team oversees a direct-to-consumer (DTC) sales network, which includes 538 offline locations—467 in China and 71 internationally—designed to provide a comprehensive, high-quality customer experience throughout the sales lifecycle. Key components of this network include the Zeekr Center, which serves as a premium showroom and community hub, and Zeekr Space, where customers can engage with products and attend events. Additionally, Zeekr Delivery Centers facilitate efficient product delivery, while Zeekr House locations are strategically positioned near car dealerships to enhance customer service through a one-stop experience. 

The Zeekr APP further streamlines the purchasing process, allowing customers to place orders with a nonrefundable deposit and customize their vehicle configurations. Following a 72-hour confirmation period, delivery specialists assist with pre-delivery arrangements and coordinate the final delivery, ensuring a seamless transition from order to ownership. This integrated approach not only enhances customer engagement but also leverages the Geely Group's supply chain to deliver value-added services efficiently.

all_retrieved_content.page_content: Zeekr’s smart cockpit is powered by Zeekr OS, an exclusive distributed operating system designed for battery electric vehicles (BEVs), seamlessly integrated with Zeekr's state-of-the-art electrical and electronic (E/E) architecture. By dynamically allocating processing power to services, functions, and applications in real-time, Zeekr OS optimizes cockpit interactions, autonomous driving, and vehicle control, ensuring a seamless and highly responsive user experience. Zeekr OS features a unified service-oriented architecture, in-house full-stack research and development (R&D), optimized network diagnostics, and automated software integration testing, eliminating system lag and enabling continuous updates. With multi-kernel compatibility (Linux, QNX), Zeekr OS supports 360-degree surround-view monitoring, parking assistance, and intelligent energy management, setting a new benchmark for BEV software architecture. The smart cockpit experience is further enhanced by the Qualcomm 8295 SoC-based platform, standard across all Zeekr vehicle models launched in 2024, with the Zeekr 009 Grand featuring the world’s first dual-8295 configuration. The Zeekr Sound audio system, equipped with AI-powered tuning, delivers premium acoustic performance, while the Human-Machine Interface (HMI) 3.5 introduces 3D navigation, advanced visual effects, and an intuitive Eva family interface. EVA, the AI-powered driving assistant, leverages machine learning, natural language processing (NLP), and computer vision to provide intelligent voice interaction, predictive assistance, and customizable AI personas. Additionally, Zeekr’s open cockpit ecosystem integrates a virtualized mobile platform, a Scenario Library, and Internet of Things (IoT) connectivity, allowing seamless integration with smart home devices, gaming, and entertainment applications such as Kid Zone, Tencent Cloud Gaming, and wireless karaoke.

metadata.title_summary:
title: Smart Cockpit 
summary: Zeekr's smart cockpit, set to launch in 2024, is powered by Zeekr OS, a specialized distributed operating system designed for battery electric vehicles (BEVs). This system integrates advanced electronic and electrical architecture, enabling real-time processing power allocation to enhance user interactions, autonomous driving, and vehicle control. Key features include a unified service-oriented architecture, in-house R&D, improved network diagnostics, and automated software integration testing, which together minimize system lag and support continuous updates. The multi-kernel compatibility allows for advanced functionalities like 360-degree surround-view monitoring and intelligent energy management, setting a new benchmark for BEV software.

The smart cockpit experience is further elevated by the Qualcomm 8295 SoC platform, particularly in the Zeekr 009 Grand, which boasts a dual-8295 configuration. The Zeekr Sound audio system delivers premium sound through AI-driven tuning, while the HMI 3.5 offers advanced 3D navigation and visual effects, enhanced by the intuitive Eva family interface. EVA, the AI assistant, leverages machine learning and natural language processing for intelligent voice interactions and customizable AI personas. The open cockpit ecosystem promotes a virtualized mobile platform and IoT connectivity, allowing integration with smart home devices and entertainment options like Kid Zone, Tencent Cloud Gaming, and wireless karaoke. Overall, Zeekr's smart cockpit, driven by Zeekr OS and AI advancements, aims to provide an immersive and connected driving experience.

all_retrieved_content.page_content: Zeekr Technology Europe AB, or Zeekr Tech EU/ZTE, is Zeekr Technology's Sweden-based R&D center founded in 2013 that is strategically focused on the following aspects. Zeekr Technology Europe AB conducts R&D activities relating to the products that Zeekr Technology plans to roll out in overseas markets. These products include, among others, (i) next-generation mobility solutions, such as robotaxi, (ii) passenger battery electric vehicles (BEVs) satisfying local standards and customer preferences, and (iii) a series of digital offerings, such as data analytics tools and smart cockpit functions. ● Zeekr Technology Europe AB also implements the development of a variety of BEV-related technologies and capabilities, such as user-centric systems with in-vehicle, cloud, and mobile functionalities, in-vehicle centralized architecture, as well as a cloud-based data management platform for user experiences and data analytics. Zeekr Technology Europe AB also provides specific R&D services on a project basis. ● In addition, Zeekr Technology Europe AB has developed SEA-M, an advanced version of SEA featuring integration potential for autonomous driving systems and future smart mobility, to support Zeekr Technology’s next-generation BEVs. SEA-M is designed to enable mobility solutions that fulfill different use cases with superior driving experience, ultralong durability, and the capabilities for ongoing upgrades. BEVs developed on this platform, such as the Zeekr Mix and Waymo RT robotaxi, can have a number of innovative features, such as wide door openings with no B-pillar, highly flexible interiors, and advanced interior climate technologies. SEA-M will further facilitate the design for future BEV models.

metadata.title_summary:
title: Zeekr Tech EU 
summary: Zeekr Technology Europe AB (Zeekr Tech EU), established in 2013 in Sweden, serves as a research and development hub focused on creating innovative products for international markets. The organization specializes in next-generation mobility solutions, including robotaxis and battery electric vehicles (BEVs) tailored to local standards, alongside digital offerings like data analytics and smart cockpit functions. A significant focus is placed on advancing BEV technologies that prioritize user-centric systems, integrating in-vehicle, cloud, and mobile functionalities with centralized architecture for improved user experiences.

Central to Zeekr Tech EU's initiatives is the SEA-M platform, an evolution of the SEA architecture designed to support autonomous driving and smart mobility. This platform aims to deliver versatile mobility options, exceptional driving experiences, and long-lasting vehicles that can be continuously upgraded. BEVs developed on this platform, such as the Zeekr Mix and Waymo RT robotaxi, feature innovative designs, including wide door openings and flexible interiors. By the end of 2024, the company employed 733 individuals, focusing on mobility technologies, digital solutions, and future product development.

all_retrieved_content.page_content: Zeekr 001, Zeekr's first mass-produced battery electric vehicle (BEV), is a premium crossover shooting brake developed with proprietary research and development (R&D), deep market insights, and the Sustainable Experience Architecture (SEA) platform. Launched in April 2021 with deliveries beginning in October 2021, the Zeekr 001 was the first mass-produced BEV with over $1,000 kilometers CLTC range. In October 2023, Zeekr introduced the Zeekr 001 FR, a high-performance variant featuring a lightweight carbon fiber body, 800V Qilin battery, and quad e-drive system, achieving 2.02 seconds 0-100 kilometers per hour acceleration and a 280 kilometers per hour top speed. In 2024, Zeekr launched upgraded versions of the Zeekr 001 with Zeekr Intelligent Driving 2.0 and significant performance, safety, and intelligence upgrades.

In 2024, the Zeekr 001 received upgrades, including the Zeekr Intelligent Driving 2.0 system, enhancing its performance, safety, and intelligence.

metadata.title_summary:
title: 1. Principal activities and history of the Group 
summary: ZEEKR Intelligent Technology Holding Limited, established on March 31, 2021, in the Cayman Islands, specializes in the commercialization and sales of electric vehicles and batteries, along with providing automotive-related research and development services through its subsidiaries. The company emerged from a reorganization initiated by Zhejiang Geely Holding Group Co., Ltd., which aimed to create an independent Battery Electric Vehicles (BEV) business to attract external investment and prepare for an overseas listing. This reorganization involved transferring various entities, including ZEEKR Automobile (Shanghai) Co., Ltd., ZEEKR Automobile (Ningbo Hangzhou Bay New Zone) Co., Ltd., Viridi E-Mobility Technology (Ningbo) Co., Ltd., and ZEEKR Technology Europe AB, under the common control of Geely Holding to Zeekr.

In July 2021, ZEEKR established a wholly-owned subsidiary in China and subsequently acquired full equity stakes in Zeekr Hangzhou Bay and Zeekr Shanghai, incurring minor losses in additional paid-in capital. Additionally, Zeekr Shanghai acquired a 51% interest in Ningbo Viridi and later, in February 2022, ZTE from Geely Holding, further solidifying its operational structure. By May 2024, ZEEKR achieved a significant milestone by successfully listing on the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE), marking its growth and establishment in the electric vehicle market.

metadata.title_summary:
title: 1. Principal activities and history of the group 
summary: ZEEKR Intelligent Technology Holding Limited, established in the Cayman Islands on March 31, 2021, is dedicated to the commercialization and sales of electric vehicles (EVs) and batteries, alongside providing automotive-related research and development services through its subsidiaries. The formation of ZEEKR was part of a strategic reorganization by Zhejiang Geely Holding Group Co., Ltd. to create a focused Battery Electric Vehicle (BEV) business in preparation for an overseas listing. This restructuring involved transferring various subsidiaries previously under Geely Holding and Geely Auto to ZEEKR, which now operates as the holding company for these BEV-related operations.

Key subsidiaries include ZEEKR Automobile (Shanghai) Co., Ltd., which serves as an investment holding company; ZEEKR Automobile (Ningbo Hangzhou Bay New Zone) Co., Ltd., responsible for the production and commercialization of EVs; and Viridi E-Mobility Technology (Ningbo) Co., Ltd., which specializes in electric powertrains and battery packs. Additionally, Zeekr Technology Europe AB, based in Sweden, focuses on R&D services. 

In July 2021, ZEEKR established a wholly-owned subsidiary, Zhejiang ZEEKR Intelligent Technology Co., Ltd., and acquired ZEEKR Hangzhou Bay from Geely Holding for RMB485.3 million, despite its net book value being RMB500 million. This was followed by the acquisition of ZEEKR Shanghai for RMB980.4 million, with a net book value of RMB970.4 million, resulting in recognized losses in additional paid-in capital. Overall, these developments underscore ZEEKR's commitment to advancing its strategic objectives within the electric vehicle market.

all_retrieved_content.page_content: Within less than three years since ZEEKR’s inception, ZEEKR has launched multiple commercialized electric vehicle models, namely ZEEKR 001, ZEEKR 001 FR, ZEEKR 009, ZEEKR X, and an upscale sedan model. ZEEKR 001 is a five-seater crossover shooting brake BEV model targeting the premium market and mainly addressing the customer need for practical yet stylish traveling. ZEEKR released ZEEKR 001 (2024 model) in February 2024 and started vehicle delivery in March 2024. ZEEKR 009 is a luxury six-seater MPV addressing the customer need for luxury mobility. In April 2023, ZEEKR released ZEEKR X, the compact SUV model, and began to deliver ZEEKR X in June 2023. ZEEKR also started to deliver ZEEKR 001 FR in November 2023 and began to deliver the first upscale sedan model in January 2024. In addition to major upgrades such as the release of ZEEKR 001 (2024 model), ZEEKR has also been continuously fine-tuning and improving the performance of other BEV models. For example, ZEEKR updated the interior configurations of ZEEKR 009 and improved the chassis system of ZEEKR X in 2024. In April 2024, ZEEKR launched ZEEKR 009 Grand, a luxury version of ZEEKR 009 featuring enhanced safety, privacy, and intelligence. ZEEKR also released ZEEKR MIX, the MPV model, in the same month.

metadata.title_summary:
title: An Innovative Automotive Technology Company with Strong Product Offering to Capture Massive Premium BEV Market Opportunity 
summary: ZEEKR is an emerging battery electric vehicle (BEV) technology company dedicated to creating premium electric vehicles and innovative solutions that promote the electrification and intelligentization of the automotive sector. Operating as an independent startup, ZEEKR utilizes its in-house research and development capabilities alongside a proprietary sales and marketing network, all managed by a diverse and efficient leadership team. Notably, while some executives have ties to Geely Auto, they will not hold executive roles post-offering, ensuring a distinct operational identity.

Since its launch less than three years ago, ZEEKR has introduced several models, including the ZEEKR 001, a five-seater crossover, the luxury ZEEKR 009 MPV, and the compact ZEEKR X SUV, among others. The brand has garnered significant market attention, achieving rapid sales milestones, such as 10,000 deliveries of the ZEEKR 001 shortly after its release, positioning it as one of China’s fastest-selling premium BEVs.

ZEEKR vehicles are built on Geely Holding's proprietary SEA platform, which facilitates swift development and launch of new models while ensuring exceptional performance and user experience. The ZEEKR 001 and ZEEKR 009 are recognized for their impressive range capabilities, with the ZEEKR 009 being the first pure-electric MPV to exceed 800 km in range. Additionally, ZEEKR incorporates advanced autonomous driving technologies powered by cutting-edge hardware, enhancing both performance and safety.

The company emphasizes customer satisfaction through a focus on innovative technology and premium features, such as customizable in-vehicle configurations and luxurious amenities in models like the ZEEKR 009 Grand, which includes heated massaging seats and high-quality entertainment systems. Overall, ZEEKR is committed to delivering a holistic smart mobility experience, setting a high standard in the premium BEV market.

title: 1. Principal activities and history of the group 
summary: ZEEKR Intelligent Technology Holding Limited, established in the Cayman Islands on March 31, 2021, is dedicated to the commercialization and sales of electric vehicles (EVs) and batteries, alongside providing automotive-related research and development services. The company emerged from a restructuring of operations previously managed by Zhejiang Geely Holding Group Co., Ltd., with the aim of creating a focused battery electric vehicle (BEV) business to attract investment and facilitate overseas listings.

The ZEEKR Group comprises several entities, each with specific roles in the EV ecosystem. Key entities include ZEEKR Automobile (Shanghai) Co., Ltd., an investment holding company; ZEEKR Automobile (Ningbo Hangzhou Bay New Zone) Co., Ltd., which handles EV production and commercialization; Viridi E-Mobility Technology (Ningbo) Co., Ltd., focused on electric powertrains and battery packs; and Zeekr Technology Europe AB in Sweden, specializing in research and development.

The restructuring process involved transferring relevant businesses to ZEEKR, which was recognized as a holding company for BEV operations previously under Geely Holding. In July 2021, ZEEKR established a wholly-owned subsidiary in China and acquired ZEEKR Hangzhou Bay from Geely Holding for RMB485.3 million, followed by the acquisition of ZEEKR Shanghai for RMB980.4 million in August. These transactions, treated as restructuring under common control, aimed to streamline operations and enhance ZEEKR's strategic focus on advancing electric vehicle commercialization and supporting related activities.

These products include, among others, (i) next-generation mobility solutions, such as robotaxi, (ii) passenger BEVs satisfying local standards and requirements, and (iii) a series of digital offerings, such as data analytics tools, smart cockpit, and fleet operation. • CEVT also implements the development of a variety of BEV-related technologies and capabilities, such as user-centric systems with in-vehicle, cloud, and mobile functionalities, in-vehicle centralized architecture, as well as a cloud-based data management platform for IoT devices, user experiences, and data analytics. CEVT also provides specific R&D services on a project basis. • In addition, CEVT is developing SEA-M, an advanced version of SEA featuring autonomous driving and future smart mobility, to support Zeekr Technology's next-generation battery electric vehicles (BEVs). SEA-M is designed to enable mobility solutions that fulfill different use cases with a superior driving experience, ultra-long durability, and the capabilities for ongoing upgrades. CEVT expects the BEVs developed on this platform will have a number of innovative features, such as no B-pillar, coach doors, and advanced air conditioning technologies. SEA-M will further facilitate CEVT's design for future BEV models.

title: CEVT 
summary: Zeekr Technology Europe AB, also known as CEVT, is a Swedish research and development center established in 2013, focusing on automotive technology and innovation for international markets, particularly Europe and the United States. CEVT specializes in next-generation mobility solutions, including robotaxis and passenger battery electric vehicles (BEVs) that meet local standards, alongside digital tools like data analytics and smart cockpit systems. The center is advancing BEV-related technologies with an emphasis on user-centric systems that integrate in-vehicle, cloud, and mobile functionalities, as well as centralized architecture and cloud-based data management for IoT devices. A key project is the SEA-M platform, an enhanced version of their SEA platform, designed to improve ZEEKR's future BEVs with autonomous driving capabilities and smart mobility features, promising a superior driving experience and innovative designs. As of December 31, 2023, CEVT employed 715 individuals, primarily focused on mobility technologies and product development.

all_retrieved_content.page_content: Lotus Technology is a fast-growing battery electric vehicle (BEV) technology company developing and offering next-generation premium BEVs and technology-driven solutions to lead the electrification, intelligentization, and innovation of the automobile industry. Lotus Technology is an independently-run startup-style company relying on its in-house research and development (R&D) capabilities and self-owned sales and marketing network, among others. Lotus Technology adopts a flat and efficient organizational structure led by key management with diversified backgrounds. Since inception, Lotus Technology has been managed and directed by its executive officers, and save for Conghui An, who is currently an executive director of Geely Auto, none of Lotus Technology's executive officers are members of management of Geely Auto. Additionally, Mr. An is expected to not hold any positions in Geely Auto prior to or upon the completion of the offering. While Lotus Technology's chairman, Shufu Li, is also the chairman of Geely Auto, upon the completion of the offering, the directors that Lotus Technology shares in common with Geely Auto will not have executive roles at Lotus Technology. Lotus Technology has been dedicated to serving its customers by leveraging top-notch technology, advanced product concepts, and an enriched entrepreneurial spirit that embraces creativity and innovation. ZEEKR is strategically positioned as a premium battery electric vehicle (BEV) brand that delivers an ultimate experience covering driving, charging, after-sale service, and customer community engagement. ZEEKR’s product family meets a wide spectrum of customer needs in different mobility and travel scenarios and is highly customized with a wide selection of vehicle configurations.

metadata.title_summary:
title: An Innovative Automotive Technology Company with Strong Product Offering to Capture Massive Premium BEV Market Opportunity 
summary: ZEEKR is an emerging battery electric vehicle (BEV) technology company dedicated to creating premium electric vehicles and innovative solutions that promote the electrification and intelligentization of the automotive sector. Operating as an independent startup, ZEEKR utilizes its in-house research and development capabilities alongside a proprietary sales and marketing network, all managed by a diverse and efficient leadership team. Notably, while some executives have ties to Geely Auto, they will not hold executive roles post-offering, ensuring a distinct operational identity.

Since its launch less than three years ago, ZEEKR has introduced several models, including the ZEEKR 001, a five-seater crossover, the luxury ZEEKR 009 MPV, and the compact ZEEKR X SUV, among others. The brand has garnered significant market attention, achieving rapid sales milestones, such as 10,000 deliveries of the ZEEKR 001 shortly after its release, positioning it as one of China’s fastest-selling premium BEVs.

ZEEKR vehicles are built on Geely Holding's proprietary SEA platform, which facilitates swift development and launch of new models while ensuring exceptional performance and user experience. The ZEEKR 001 and ZEEKR 009 are recognized for their impressive range capabilities, with the ZEEKR 009 being the first pure-electric MPV to exceed 800 km in range. Additionally, ZEEKR incorporates advanced autonomous driving technologies powered by cutting-edge hardware, enhancing both performance and safety.

The company emphasizes customer satisfaction through a focus on innovative technology and premium features, such as customizable in-vehicle configurations and luxurious amenities in models like the ZEEKR 009 Grand, which includes heated massaging seats and high-quality entertainment systems. Overall, ZEEKR is committed to delivering a holistic smart mobility experience, setting a high standard in the premium BEV market.

all_retrieved_content.page_content: ZEEKR's products have been well received by the market, achieving a total delivery of 10,000 units of ZEEKR 001 in less than four months since its initial delivery in October 2021, which, according to Frost & Sullivan, is one of the fastest among the major mid- to high-end new energy vehicle (NEV) models and premium BEV models in China. Lotus Technology's current and future models will be primarily based on Geely Holding’s proprietary SEA, which is highly agile, compatible, and enables Lotus Technology to quickly build and launch a wide range of vehicle models catering to different demands in the premium BEV segment. Developed based on SEA, ZEEKR vehicles embody impressive vehicle performance, FOTA-enabled upgrades, superior driving and riding experiences, as well as striking and trendy designs that provide a comprehensive smart mobility experience to Lotus Technology's customers. • Outstanding battery and range performance. The up-to- $100 \mathrm{kWh}$ battery supports a maximum CLTC range of $741 \mathrm{km}$ on ZEEKR 001 and $750 \mathrm{km}$ on ZEEKR 001 (2024 model), respectively, which is ahead of most of the BEV models of Lotus Technology's peers, according to Frost & Sullivan. According to Frost & Sullivan, ZEEKR 009 is the world’s first pure-electric MPV model with over $800 \mathrm{km}$ CLTC range, and it has the longest all-electric range in the MPV market by the end of February 2024. • State-of-the-art autonomous driving expertise.

all_retrieved_content.page_content: Lotus Technology adopts a customer-oriented and go-to-market philosophy. The company's professional, efficient in-house sales and marketing team is in charge of the direct-to-consumer (DTC) sales network, especially in key aspects such as site selection, construction, and operation of the sales centers, as well as a series of delivery and after-sales services. Lotus Technology is committed to building a DTC sales model to provide customers with a full lifecycle superior experience and value-added services. As of December 31, 2023, approximately 84.8% of Lotus Technology's sales and marketing team employees had extensive backgrounds in the automobile and retail industries. Lotus Technology's sales network consists of ZEEKR Center, ZEEKR Space, ZEEKR Delivery Center, and ZEEKR House. The following diagram illustrates the geographic allocation of Lotus Technology's sales network as of December 31, 2023. • ZEEKR Center. The ZEEKR Center, the high-end showroom of the ZEEKR brand and products and the hub for customer community, events, and interaction, is conveniently located in urban commercial centers where Lotus Technology directly engages and interacts with customers. The ZEEKR Center is the key touchpoint in Lotus Technology's sales and service network, through which the company interacts with prospective or existing customers to build the community, enhance brand reputation, and understand customer demands. Each ZEEKR Center typically occupies 300 square meters to 600 square meters, providing customers with ample space to hold offline events or enjoy leisure time. As of December 31, 2023, Lotus Technology had 24 ZEEKR Centers in China and two ZEEKR Centers overseas. • ZEEKR Space.

metadata.title_summary:
title: Direct Sales and Service Model 
summary: ZEEKR adopts a customer-centric, go-to-market strategy, spearheaded by a proficient in-house sales and marketing team that oversees its direct-to-consumer (DTC) sales network. This network is designed to provide a superior customer experience throughout the entire engagement lifecycle, focusing on site selection, construction, and operation of sales centers, as well as comprehensive delivery and after-sales services. As of December 31, 2023, approximately 84.8% of the sales and marketing team members have significant experience in the automobile and retail industries.

The ZEEKR sales network comprises four main components: ZEEKR Centers, ZEEKR Spaces, ZEEKR Delivery Centers, and ZEEKR Houses. By the end of 2023, ZEEKR Centers, which are upscale showrooms ranging from 300 to 600 square meters, numbered 24 in China and two internationally. ZEEKR Spaces, smaller venues of 100 to 300 square meters, total 240 in China, including 42 flexible Pop-Up locations aimed at increasing customer outreach. The ZEEKR Delivery Centers, totaling 31, are strategically located outside urban areas to facilitate efficient vehicle storage and delivery. Additionally, 45 ZEEKR Houses leverage the Geely Group's service network to enhance customer experiences, situated near car dealerships across various city tiers.

ZEEKR's facilities are designed to promote community engagement and strengthen brand reputation. The ZEEKR APP enables potential customers to order vehicles with non-refundable deposits, offering various configuration options due to robust supply chain management from Geely Group. Customers have a 72-hour Configuration Confirmation Period to finalize vehicle details after placing an order, with delivery specialists assisting in pre-delivery arrangements. The remaining balance is paid upon vehicle delivery, ensuring a streamlined purchasing process.

all_retrieved_content.page_content: Customers try out ZEEKR products and technologies, as well as participate in a wide range of events in ZEEKR Space, which usually occupies 100 square meters to 300 square meters in commercial areas. As of December 31, 2023, Lotus Technology had 240 ZEEKR Spaces in China. Among those, the company has launched 42 Pop-Up ZEEKR Spaces in China, which have more flexible leasing terms than the usual ZEEKR Space and help Lotus Technology connect with an expanded customer base. • ZEEKR Delivery Center. Lotus Technology uses ZEEKR Delivery Centers for product delivery. As of December 31, 2023, the company had 31 ZEEKR Delivery Centers in China, most of which are located at facilities with large areas outside urban commercial centers to allow for vehicle storage and simultaneous delivery. • ZEEKR House. Lotus Technology launches additional ZEEKR Houses in areas where car dealer shops are located across different tiers of cities in China, which allows the company to utilize the cluster effect and provide customers with a superior one-stop experience. Leveraging the service network of sister brands in Geely Group, Lotus Technology plans to develop ZEEKR Houses cost-effectively and rapidly, with the ZEEKR brand and design, and its own staff in charge of ZEEKR House’s daily operation. As of December 31, 2023, Lotus Technology had 45 ZEEKR Houses in China.

all_retrieved_content.page_content: Through the ZEEKR APP, prospective customers can place orders by (i) for ZEEKR 001, paying a nonrefundable deposit of RMB5,000, (ii) for ZEEKR 001 FR, paying a non-refundable deposit of RMB30,000, (iii) for ZEEKR 009, paying a non-refundable order deposit of RMB20,000, (iv) for ZEEKR X, paying a non-refundable deposit of RMB5,000, and (v) for the upscale sedan model, paying a non-refundable deposit of RMB5,000. Relying on Lotus Technology's strong supply chain management capabilities inherited from Geely Group, Lotus Technology enables customers to choose from a vast pool of configurations, such as vehicle color, wheel hub size and style, air suspension system option, automatic door option, sound system, intelligent air conditioning package, and seat ventilation. For ZEEKR 001 and ZEEKR 009, within 72 hours after the payment of the non-refundable order deposit (the “Configuration Confirmation Period”), Lotus Technology will notify the prospective customers to confirm various details about the vehicles. Upon the lapse of the Configuration Confirmation Period, the orders will automatically be locked and the customers will not be allowed to change the configurations of their vehicles. Lotus Technology's delivery specialists will follow up with customers on pre-delivery matters, such as vehicle financing services and home charger installation.

title: Direct Sales and Service Model 
summary: The company adopts a customer-centric and market-driven approach, guided by a proficient in-house sales and marketing team that oversees its direct-to-consumer (DTC) sales network. This network encompasses site selection, construction, and operation of sales centers, alongside comprehensive delivery and after-sales services, all aimed at providing customers with an exceptional experience and value throughout the product lifecycle. Delivery specialists assist with pre-delivery arrangements, and customers are contacted to finalize delivery once their vehicles arrive at the delivery centers. This comprehensive strategy reflects ZEEKR's commitment to enhancing brand presence and customer satisfaction.

title: OUR VEHICLES 
summary: ZEEKR is strategically positioned in the premium battery electric vehicle (BEV) market, focusing on the design, engineering, and sale of advanced electric vehicles that enhance user experience and drivability. Leveraging its strong research and development capabilities and synergies with Geely Group, ZEEKR aims to tap into China's burgeoning premium BEV market, which is projected to grow significantly from 666,400 units in 2024 to 2,607,600 units by 2028, according to Frost & Sullivan.

Since its inception, ZEEKR has launched several models, starting with the ZEEKR 001 in 2021, followed by the upgraded 2024 model, the ZEEKR 009, and the compact SUV ZEEKR X. The company has also expanded its offerings with the ZEEKR 001 FR and an upscale sedan, reflecting its commitment to catering to diverse customer needs. As of December 31, 2023, ZEEKR has delivered a total of 196,633 vehicles, primarily in China, marking one of the fastest growth rates in the premium BEV segment.

The monthly delivery data from June 2023 to March 2024 shows a consistent upward trend, with March 2024 witnessing 13,012 units delivered. This growth is indicative of rising consumer demand and ZEEKR's operational capabilities, positioning the company as a significant player in the global market. ZEEKR has also begun deliveries in Europe and plans to supply vehicles for the Waymo One Fleet in the U.S., highlighting its ambitions for international expansion. Overall, ZEEKR's trajectory reflects a robust commitment to innovation and market growth in the premium electric vehicle sector.

metadata.title_summary:
title: 1. Principal activities and history of the group 
summary: ZEEKR Intelligent Technology Holding Limited, established in the Cayman Islands on March 31, 2021, is dedicated to the commercialization and sales of electric vehicles (EVs) and batteries, alongside providing automotive-related research and development services. The company emerged from a restructuring of operations previously managed by Zhejiang Geely Holding Group Co., Ltd., with the aim of creating a focused battery electric vehicle (BEV) business to attract investment and facilitate overseas listings.

The ZEEKR Group comprises several entities, each with specific roles in the EV ecosystem. Key entities include ZEEKR Automobile (Shanghai) Co., Ltd., an investment holding company; ZEEKR Automobile (Ningbo Hangzhou Bay New Zone) Co., Ltd., which handles EV production and commercialization; Viridi E-Mobility Technology (Ningbo) Co., Ltd., focused on electric powertrains and battery packs; and Zeekr Technology Europe AB in Sweden, specializing in research and development.

The restructuring process involved transferring relevant businesses to ZEEKR, which was recognized as a holding company for BEV operations previously under Geely Holding. In July 2021, ZEEKR established a wholly-owned subsidiary in China and acquired ZEEKR Hangzhou Bay from Geely Holding for RMB485.3 million, followed by the acquisition of ZEEKR Shanghai for RMB980.4 million in August. These transactions, treated as restructuring under common control, aimed to streamline operations and enhance ZEEKR's strategic focus on advancing electric vehicle commercialization and supporting related activities.

all_retrieved_content.page_content: In 2021, in an effort to establish an independent Battery Electric Vehicles (BEV) business to obtain investment from outside investors and in preparation for an overseas listing, Zhejiang Geely Holding Group Co., Ltd. (“Geely Holding”), the controlling shareholder of Geely Automobile Holdings Limited (‘‘Geely Auto’’), undertook a series of contemplated reorganizations (the “Reorganization”). The main purpose of the Reorganization is to establish ZEEKR Intelligent Technology Holding Limited as the overseas holding company for the above BEV-related businesses that were originally operated within Geely Holding and Geely Auto. Subsequent to the establishment of ZEEKR in March 2021, the above businesses were transferred to ZEEKR by Geely Holding and Geely Auto as part of the Reorganization. As these entities being transferred are all under the common control of Geely Holding, these transfers were accounted for as a restructuring of entities under common control as follows: • In July 2021, ZEEKR Intelligent Technology Holding Limited established Zhejiang ZEEKR Intelligent Technology Co., Ltd. (“Zhejiang ZEEKR”) in the People’s Republic of China (“PRC”), a wholly-owned subsidiary. • In July 2021, ZEEKR Automobile (Shanghai) Co., Ltd. (“ZEEKR Shanghai”), a subsidiary of Geely Automobile Holdings Limited (“Geely Auto”), acquired 100% equity interest in ZEEKR Automobile (Ningbo Hangzhou Bay New Zone) Co., Ltd. (“ZEEKR Hangzhou Bay”) from Zhejiang Geely Holding Group Co., Ltd. (“Geely Holding”) for a cash consideration of RMB485.3 million. The net book value of ZEEKR Hangzhou Bay at the time of acquisition was RMB500 million.

metadata.title_summary:
title: OVERVIEW 
summary: ZEEKR is an emerging leader in the battery electric vehicle (BEV) sector, dedicated to driving innovation and electrification within the automotive industry. The company focuses on developing next-generation premium BEVs and technology-driven solutions, leveraging strong in-house research and development capabilities and a flexible organizational structure to rapidly create and launch customer-oriented products. 

Since its inception, ZEEKR has introduced several groundbreaking models, including the ZEEKR 001, recognized as the world's first mass-produced pure electric shooting brake with a range exceeding 1,000 km, and the luxury ZEEKR 009 MPV, which offers an ultra-luxury experience. The lineup also features the compact ZEEKR X SUV and a newly launched upscale sedan model, all designed to cater to diverse consumer needs while emphasizing stylish design, high performance, and exceptional user experiences.

ZEEKR's growth trajectory has been impressive, with significant milestones such as delivering over 10,000 units of the ZEEKR 001 within four months of its launch and achieving a total of 196,633 vehicle deliveries by the end of 2023. The company benefits from its affiliation with Geely Group, which provides extensive industry expertise, innovative engineering, and a robust supply chain, enhancing ZEEKR's product reliability and market competitiveness.

The company is also committed to advancing its technological capabilities, focusing on electrification and intelligent mobility. This includes the development of its proprietary E/E architecture and ZEEKR OS, which facilitate over-the-air updates and the integration of cutting-edge autonomous driving technologies. 

As the global BEV market is poised for substantial growth, particularly in China and Europe, ZEEKR aims to capitalize on this potential by expanding its vehicle portfolio and enhancing its customer engagement through a direct-to-consumer sales model. The company has established a comprehensive charging network and formed strategic partnerships to bolster its business development and global reach, positioning itself for continued success in the rapidly evolving electric vehicle landscape.

all_retrieved_content.page_content: Lotus Technology is a fast-growing BEV technology company. Through developing and offering next-generation premium BEVs and technology-driven solutions, Lotus Technology aspires to lead the electrification, intelligentization, and innovation of the automobile industry. Since its inception, Lotus Technology has focused on innovation in BEV architecture, hardware, software, and application of new technologies. Lotus Technology's efforts are backed by strong in-house R&D capabilities, a deep understanding of products, high operational flexibility, and a flat, efficient organizational structure. Together, these features enable fast product development, launch, and iteration, as well as a series of customer-oriented products and go-to-market strategies. Thus, Lotus Technology is able to rapidly expand even with a limited operating history. Lotus Technology strategically spearheaded the premium intelligent BEV market with unique positioning, featuring a strong sense of technology, in-house R&D capabilities, stylish design, high-caliber performance, and a premium user experience. Lotus Technology's current product portfolio primarily includes ZEEKR 001, ZEEKR 001 FR, ZEEKR 009, ZEEKR X, and an upscale sedan model. • ZEEKR 001. With an unwavering commitment to its mission, Lotus Technology released ZEEKR 001 in April 2021, a five-seater, cross-over hatchback vehicle model with superior performance and functionality. Targeting the premium BEV market, ZEEKR 001 is Lotus Technology's first vehicle model and the world’s first mass-produced pure electric shooting brake, according to Frost & Sullivan. ZEEKR 001 is also the first mass-produced BEV model with over $1,000 km CLTC range, according to Frost & Sullivan. Lotus Technology began the delivery of ZEEKR 001 in October 2021.

metadata.title_summary:
title: After-sales Services and Value-added Services 
summary: Our after-sales services provide a comprehensive lifetime care package for customers, covering the entire product lifecycle of our battery electric vehicles (BEVs). Key offerings include quality assurance, roadside assistance, and 5G data services, alongside tailored warranty policies based on vehicle usage. Our customer support initiative, Zeekr Care, utilizes intelligent solutions for remote vehicle monitoring and diagnostics, ensuring drivers have access to immediate roadside assistance and a 24/7 user companion through our extensive service network across 31 provinces in China and 38 countries. In 2024, Zeekr Care managed around 38,000 roadside assistance incidents in China alone. We also offer convenient services like doorstep maintenance through “Zeekr Carefree Packages” and “Power Delivery,” which transports BEVs to charging stations and back, available in 44 cities as of December 31, 2024. Additionally, we enhance customer engagement through vehicle subscriptions, pre-owned vehicle certification services, and the sale of mobility-related products via our online community. Collaborating with major banks and Genius Auto Finance, we facilitate auto financing without service fees or credit risk, allowing customers to apply for loans through the Zeekr APP or at our Delivery Centers, with repayments made directly to the financial institutions.

all_retrieved_content.page_content: Lotus Technology also offers certification services for users’ pre-owned vehicles in connection with their vehicle trade-ins. title: Total 
summary: The summary provides an overview of the revenue and cost dynamics of a company over the years 2022 to 2024, focusing on three main operating activities: vehicle sales, sales of batteries and components, and research and development services.

**Revenue Insights**: Vehicle sales emerged as the dominant revenue source, showing substantial growth from RMB 19.67 million in 2022 to RMB 55.32 million in 2024, increasing its share of total revenues from 61.7% to 72.9%. In contrast, sales of batteries and components experienced a modest increase, rising from RMB 10.32 million in 2022 to RMB 16.79 million in 2024, but its relative contribution declined from 32.3% to 22.1%. Revenue from research and development services also grew steadily, albeit from a small base, reaching RMB 3.80 million in 2024, representing 5.0% of total revenues. Overall, total revenues surged from RMB 31.90 million in 2022 to RMB 75.91 million in 2024.

**Cost Analysis**: The total cost of revenues mirrored the growth in sales, escalating from RMB 29.43 million in 2022 to RMB 63.47 million in 2024. Costs associated with vehicle sales rose significantly, accounting for 63.7% of total costs in 2022 and increasing to 73.5% by 2024. Conversely, the costs related to batteries and components, as well as research and development, saw a decline in their percentage contributions to total costs, reflecting the increasing dominance of vehicle sales in both revenue and cost structures.

**Operational Context**: The company’s revenue streams are bolstered by a range of electric vehicle models and complementary products, including charging solutions and after-sales services. Additionally, it has established strategic agreements with Geely Holding and Geely Group, which support its manufacturing and operational capabilities. As of December 31, 2024, the company reported no significant long-term obligations beyond those related to these agreements.

In summary, the analysis underscores the pivotal role of vehicle sales in driving revenue growth while highlighting shifts in the contributions of other revenue streams and the associated costs over the three-year period.

The analysis focuses on three primary revenue streams: vehicle sales, sales of batteries and components, and research and development (R&D) services, with all figures reported in thousands of RMB and 2023 amounts converted to USD.

**Key Highlights:**

1. **Vehicle Sales**: This category experienced remarkable growth, with revenues soaring from RMB 1,544,320 in 2021 (23.7% of total revenues) to RMB 19,671,247 in 2022 (61.7%), and further to RMB 33,911,762 in 2023 (USD 4,776,372), representing 65.6% of total revenues. The increase was driven by a rise in sales volume, particularly of various ZEEKR models, which saw deliveries jump from 71,941 units in 2022 to 118,685 units in 2023.

2. **Sales of Batteries and Components**: Revenue from this segment rose from RMB 2,128,193 in 2021 (32.6% of total revenues) to RMB 10,317,822 in 2022 (32.3%), and reached RMB 14,692,617 in 2023 (USD 2,069,412), although its share of total revenues decreased to 28.4%. The growth was attributed to higher overseas sales and an improved product mix.

3. **Research and Development Services**: Initially contributing RMB 2,855,005 in 2021 (43.7% of total revenues), this revenue stream saw a decline to RMB 1,910,379 in 2022 (6.0%) before rebounding slightly to RMB 3,068,239 in 2023 (USD 432,152), maintaining a 6.0% share of total revenues. The fluctuations were influenced by changes in focus and revenue generation strategies post-acquisition.

summary: The revenue breakdown table offers a comprehensive analysis of the company's financial performance across various business segments for the years 2021, 2022, and 2023. It details both the absolute revenue figures and their respective percentages of total revenues, illustrating each segment's contribution to overall growth.

In 2021, total revenues were 6,527,518 RMB, with vehicle sales accounting for 1,544,320 RMB (23.7%), battery and component sales at 2,128,193 RMB (32.6%), and research and development services contributing 2,855,005 RMB (43.7%). The following year, 2022, saw a dramatic increase in total revenues to 31,899,448 RMB, driven primarily by vehicle sales, which surged to 19,671,247 RMB (61.7%). Battery sales remained stable at 10,317,822 RMB (32.3%), while R&D services fell to 1,910,379 RMB (6.0%).

By 2023, total revenues reached 51,672,618 RMB (approximately 7,277,936 US$), with vehicle sales continuing to dominate at 33,911,762 RMB (65.6%). Battery and component sales increased to 14,692,617 RMB (28.4%), and R&D services slightly rose to 3,068,239 RMB (6.0%). This growth reflects a significant rise in vehicle deliveries, particularly of ZEEKR models, and an increase in battery component sales, which included a notable contribution from overseas markets.

The data emphasizes the necessity of analyzing revenue streams to understand the company's operational and financial health. The company generates revenue through various activities, primarily from electric vehicle sales, complemented by battery and component sales, and R&D services related to battery electric vehicles. The substantial revenue growth from 2022 to 2023, which increased by 62.0%, was fueled by higher vehicle sales volumes and improved pricing strategies, alongside a recovery in R&D service revenues.
